languages.text: "Союз верных слуг Бога-Императора, благословленный помазанни{mf|ком|цей} Его? О большем не стоит и мечтать".
"An alliance of the God-Emperor's faithful servants, blessed by His anointed one? We could ask for nothing greater."
languages.original_text: "Союз верных слуг Бога-Императора, благословленный помазанни{mf|ком|цей} Его? О большем не стоит и мечтать".

traits.locale_text: "An alliance of the God-Emperor's faithful servants, blessed by His anointed one? We could ask for nothing greater."
"An alliance of the God-Emperor's faithful servants, blessed by His anointed one? We could ask for nothing greater."
"An alliance of like-minded people? I never would have thought of nobles in such terms, but you're right."
"An alliance of the God-Emperor's faithful servants, blessed by His anointed one? We could ask for nothing greater."
"An alliance of the God-Emperor's faithful servants, blessed by His anointed one? We could ask for nothing greater."

languages.text: 「志を同じくする者たちの同盟か？貴族をそんな風に考えるなんて、私は考えたこともなかったが、君が言うのは正しい」
languages.original_text: "An alliance of like-minded people? I never would have thought of nobles in such terms, but you're right."

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator'un sadık kullarının, O'nun seçilmişi tarafından kutsanmış ittifakı mı? Daha fazlasını isteyemezdik."
languages.original_text: "An alliance of the God-Emperor's faithful servants, blessed by His anointed one? We could ask for nothing greater."

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator'un sadık kullarının, O'nun seçilmişi tarafından kutsanmış ittifakı mı? Daha fazlasını isteyemezdik."

languages.text: “由神皇的忠诚仆从组成的联盟，再加上祂的神选者的赐福？这真是我们求都求不来的恩典。”
languages.original_text: "An alliance of the God-Emperor's faithful servants, blessed by His anointed one? We could ask for nothing greater."

traits.locale_text: “由神皇的忠诚仆从组成的联盟，再加上祂的神选者的赐福？这真是我们求都求不来的恩典。”

languages.text: "Eine Allianz der treuen Diener des Gottimperators, gesegnet von {mf|Seinem|Seiner} Gesalbten? Mehr könnten wir uns nicht wünschen."
languages.original_text: "An alliance of the God-Emperor's faithful servants, blessed by His anointed one? We could ask for nothing greater."

traits.locale_text: "Eine Allianz der treuen Diener des Gottimperators, gesegnet von {mf|Seinem|Seiner} Gesalbten? Mehr könnten wir uns nicht wünschen."

languages.text: « Une alliance avec les fidèles serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu, bénie par Son {mf|élu|élue} ? Nous ne pouvions pas rêver mieux. »
languages.original_text: "An alliance of the God-Emperor's faithful servants, blessed by His anointed one? We could ask for nothing greater."

traits.locale_text: « Une alliance avec les fidèles serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu, bénie par Son {mf|élu|élue} ? Nous ne pouvions pas rêver mieux. »

languages.text: «¿Una alianza con los sirvientes fieles del Dios Emperador, benditos por Su ungido? No podríamos recibir mayor honor».
languages.original_text: "An alliance of the God-Emperor's faithful servants, blessed by His anointed one? We could ask for nothing greater."

traits.locale_text: «¿Una alianza con los sirvientes fieles del Dios Emperador, benditos por Su ungido? No podríamos recibir mayor honor».
